name: RealUser
description: RealUser — Real user monitoring platform capturing web performance metrics and user journey analytics from browser sessions.

seo.title: RealUser — Session Replay / UX Analytics
seo.meta_description: RealUser: RealUser — Real user monitoring platform capturing web performance metrics and user journey analytics from browser sessions.

when_to_use: Real user monitoring capturing Core Web Vitals from browsers
User journey performance analysis from actual sessions
Browser performance data segmented by geography
Correlate slow pages with user drop-off behavior

pros: Real user monitoring ties UX to performance metrics
Captures browser-side Core Web Vitals per session
User journey analytics alongside perf data
Useful for correlating slow sessions with drop-off
cons: Positioning overlaps with both RUM and replay tools
Smaller vendor vs Datadog/New Relic for perf monitoring
Limited public case studies to validate scale
Feature depth is unclear vs bigger APM suites
review.verdict: Niche RUM tool that blends perf and journey data, but you'll likely compare it against Datadog and Sentry and lose.
review.best_for: Mid-market web teams wanting lightweight RUM with journey context.
review.not_for: Enterprises already on Datadog, New Relic or Sentry performance.
